data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts user data both in transit and at rest to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses standardized encryption protocols like TLS and AES-256.

data.title: Authentication and Access Control
data.description: Implements robust authentication mechanisms to safeguard user accounts.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Maintains a proactive incident response plan for quick mitigation of threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses intrusion detection systems and conducts regular threat assessments.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Ongoing vulnerability management and penetration testing to identify and address security flaws.
data.technical_spec: With a focus on automated scanning tools and external audits.

data.title: User Privacy Governance
data.description: Strong privacy policy in place to comply with regulations like GDPR.
data.technical_spec: Regularly reviews data handling and storage practices for compliance.
